title: Task runner launcher command not found in Docker setup
symptom: When setting up n8n with Docker Compose, the error 'command /usr/local/bin/task-runner-launcher not found' occurs.
applies_when: Using Docker Compose to run n8n
Configured to use runners for offloading tasks
root_cause: The error occurs because the Docker image's entry point prepends 'n8n' to commands, making direct calls to executables like 'task-runner-launcher' fail. This is a common issue when trying to execute commands directly in a Docker container without the correct entry point configuration.
fix_steps: Modify the Docker Compose file to include an entrypoint override
agent_instruction: Update your Docker Compose configuration to set the correct entrypoint for the task runner.
